title: Bub Spice Tin – Masala Dabba 18.5cm - Polished Stainless Steel with clear lid - 7 individual pots & serving spoon - spice storage (SPICETIN7)
features: Premium Quality Masala Dabba - Spice Tin: Crafted from high-quality stainless steel with a traditional mirror-polished finish, this 18.5cm spice tin is both elegant and durable.
Seven Spacious Compartments: Keep your spices organised and easily accessible with seven individual compartments, perfect for storing different spices.
Clear Lid for Easy Viewing: The transparent lid allows you to quickly identify your spices without opening the tin, maintaining freshness and convenience.
Perfect for Indian Cooking Enthusiasts: An ideal starter for those who love Indian cuisine - A perfect gift for lovers of Indian Food

Also available as a bundle: Including recipe book & 7 high-quality Rajah spices in resealable pouches – Garam Masala, Cumin Seeds, Ground Coriander, Turmeric, Chilli Powder, Black Mustard Seeds, and Tandoori Masala.
description: Product Description Enhance your culinary experience with a BUB Spice Tin Masala Dabba - a versatile Spice Storage set that combines elegance, functionality, and authenticity. Crafted from high-quality polished stainless steel. Choose from a Premium 9 pot Spice Tin that can hold up to 12 individual spices or a standard 7 pot Spice Tin, both hand made in India from heavy duty polished stainless steel, designed to add a touch of sophistication to your kitchen. Constructed with heavy-duty stainless steel, this Masala Dabba ensures the longevity of your spice storage. Scratch-resistant, break-proof, and corrosion-resistant, it ensures that your spices retain their authentic flavours without compromise.

specifications_table.Set Name: ‎BUB Rajah Indian Spices and Masala Dabba Bundle
